since_last: 36% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +2.38%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 36% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.26% · BTC -0.10% · Gold -0.08% · Nasdaq100 -0.41%. 36% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +2.38%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +2.38%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.15%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: DELL is the standout at -9.92%
cards.body: Leaders: POWL +5.37%, BABA +4.82%, ORCL +4.10%, AAPL +3.51%, PINS +3.07%. Laggards: DELL -9.92%, SKHY -9.86%, MU -7.66%, MRVL -7.50%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.60% at $135.26
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.60% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
